'''âg-j-b''' ('''kagajab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:expand|expand]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:expand|expand]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-j-b
|-
! Lemma
| kagajab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigajab|thigajab]] || [[word:jigajab|jigajab]] || [[word:shigajab|shigajab]] || [[word:kigajab|kigajab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugajab|thuthugajab]] || [[word:jujugajab|jujugajab]] || [[word:shushugajab|shushugajab]] || [[word:kukugajab|kukugajab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugajab|thugajab]] || [[word:jugajab|jugajab]] || [[word:shugajab|shugajab]] || [[word:kugajab|kugajab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugajab|thugajab]] || [[word:jugajab|jugajab]] || [[word:shugajab|shugajab]] || [[word:kugajab|kugajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegajab|thegajab]] || [[word:jegajab|jegajab]] || [[word:shegajab|shegajab]] || [[word:kegajab|kegajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogajab|thothogajab]] || [[word:jojogajab|jojogajab]] || [[word:shoshogajab|shoshogajab]] || [[word:kokogajab|kokogajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogajab|thogajab]] || [[word:jogajab|jogajab]] || [[word:shogajab|shogajab]] || [[word:kogajab|kogajab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogajab|thogajab]] || [[word:jogajab|jogajab]] || [[word:shogajab|shogajab]] || [[word:kogajab|kogajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgajab|thĂŠgajab]] || [[word:jĂŠgajab|jĂŠgajab]] || [[word:shĂŠgajab|shĂŠgajab]] || [[word:kĂŠgajab|kĂŠgajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagajab|thathagajab]] || [[word:jajagajab|jajagajab]] || [[word:shashagajab|shashagajab]] || [[word:kakagajab|kakagajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagajab|thagajab]] || [[word:jagajab|jagajab]] || [[word:shagajab|shagajab]] || [[word:kagajab|kagajab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagajab|thagajab]] || [[word:jagajab|jagajab]] || [[word:shagajab|shagajab]] || [[word:kagajab|kagajab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagajab|shagajab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagajab|goshagajab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagajab|gokishagajab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagajabnĂŒ|shagajabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagajabnknĂŒ|goshagajabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajabnĂŒ|gokishagajabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagajabshĂ«|shagajabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagajabnkshĂ«|goshagajabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagajabshĂ«|gokishagajabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajabro|shagajabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajabnkro|goshagajabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajabro|gokishagajabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajabmu|shagajabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajabnkmu|goshagajabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajabmu|gokishagajabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagajabsher|shagajabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagajabnksher|goshagajabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagajabsher|gokishagajabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagajabng|shagajabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagajabnkng|goshagajabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagajabng|gokishagajabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagajabya|shagajabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagajabnkya|goshagajabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagajabya|gokishagajabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagajabyam|shagajabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagajabnkyam|goshagajabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagajabyam|gokishagajabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajabnĂŒshĂ«|shagajabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagajabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagajabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajabnĂŒro|shagajabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajabnknĂŒro|goshagajabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajabnĂŒro|gokishagajabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajabnĂŒmu|shagajabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajabnknĂŒmu|goshagajabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajabnĂŒmu|gokishagajabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajabshĂ«nĂŒ|shagajabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagajabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagajabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajabshĂ«ro|shagajabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajabnkshĂ«ro|goshagajabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajabshĂ«ro|gokishagajabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajabshĂ«mu|shagajabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajabnkshĂ«mu|goshagajabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajabshĂ«mu|gokishagajabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajabronĂŒ|shagajabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajabnkronĂŒ|goshagajabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajabronĂŒ|gokishagajabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajabroshĂ«|shagajabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajabnkroshĂ«|goshagajabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajabroshĂ«|gokishagajabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajabromu|shagajabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajabnkromu|goshagajabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajabromu|gokishagajabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajabmunĂŒ|shagajabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajabnkmunĂŒ|goshagajabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajabmunĂŒ|gokishagajabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajabmushĂ«|shagajabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajabnkmushĂ«|goshagajabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajabmushĂ«|gokishagajabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajabmuro|shagajabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajabnkmuro|goshagajabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajabmuro|gokishagajabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
